name: Sunseed Shadow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖種の影芽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サンシード・シャドウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a Plant Normal Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 linked Link-2 or lower "Sunavalon" or "Sunvine" monster you control; Special Summon 1 monster with the same name from your Extra Deck, but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Plant monsters. You can only use each effect of "Sunseed Shadow" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a Plant Normal Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 linked Link-2 or lower "Sunavalon" or "Sunvine" monster you control; Special Summon 1 monster with the same name from your Extra Deck, but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Plant monsters. You can only use each effect of "Sunseed Shadow" once per turn.
eff: If you control a Plant Normal Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 linked Link-2 or lower "Sunavalon" or "Sunvine" monster you control; Special Summon 1 monster with the same name from your Extra Deck, but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Plant monsters. You can only use each effect of "Sunseed Shadow" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
Requires control of specific Link Rating
